protocol.name: lsd_oracle_autopsy_probe
protocol.type: runner-registered bundled multi-seed pure probe; no training; frozen C-LEG3/old_exact response regime
protocol.label_boundary: anomaly labels are report-only/oracle-autopsy only; never final loss, early stopping, checkpoint selection, or method claim

pair_contribution.oracle_evidence: mat_mean beats margin by averaging pairwise normal-ref × anomaly-ref contributions; rescued nodes show positive delta_mat_minus_margin.
pair_contribution.label_free_proxy: weight/contrast individual response-matrix entries using normal-only split stability and entry residuals, not anomaly labels.

direction_compatibility.oracle_evidence: delta-vs-margin/residual correlations indicate whether mat_mean adds a direction rather than only monotone margin scaling.
direction_compatibility.label_free_proxy: learn compatibility between node residual direction and reference-pair response direction from normal-only consistency.

row_column_reliability.oracle_evidence: rescued/lost groups differ in row/column range and matrix dispersion.
row_column_reliability.label_free_proxy: estimate stable normal-anchor rows and anomaly-reference columns by normal-only bootstrap/dropout reliability.

teacher_distillation.oracle_evidence: mat_mean is the current oracle-positive teacher baseline; any trainable scorer must distill only label-free matrix structure.
teacher_distillation.label_free_proxy: distill from frozen C-LEG3 mat_mean / robust row-min teacher with normal-only calibration, then test against margin and degree confounds.

anti_shortcut_confound.oracle_evidence: degree/rejection/residual summaries on discordant oracle groups expose shortcut risks.
anti_shortcut_confound.label_free_proxy: penalize high correlation with degree and simple normal-model rejection when these explain the proposed signal.

proxy_candidates.pair_contribution: weight/contrast individual response-matrix entries using normal-only split stability and entry residuals, not anomaly labels.
proxy_candidates.direction_compatibility: learn compatibility between node residual direction and reference-pair response direction from normal-only consistency.
proxy_candidates.row_column_reliability: estimate stable normal-anchor rows and anomaly-reference columns by normal-only bootstrap/dropout reliability.
proxy_candidates.teacher_distillation: distill from frozen C-LEG3 mat_mean / robust row-min teacher with normal-only calibration, then test against margin and degree confounds.
proxy_candidates.anti_shortcut_confound: penalize high correlation with degree and simple normal-model rejection when these explain the proposed signal.

gates.label_boundary: PASS: anomaly labels used only for report-only AUC/AP and oracle autopsy categories; no loss/early-stop/checkpoint/method claim.

recommendations: Use frozen mat_mean / robust row-summary as teacher baselines before adding trainable losses.
Prioritize row/column reliability and pair-contribution proxies because oracle delta is not merely margin rank.
Do not train on anomaly labels; convert only stable normal-side reliability / dropout / split signals into future losses.
Any future trainable method must beat mat_mean and report degree/rejection shortcut correlations.

rows.topk_protocol: top K within test nodes where K equals number of test anomalies; labels diagnostic-only for autopsy categories
